<> use preg_replace to find and replace urls in string search for http patterns and replace with new url ensure all instances are changed not just first one keep html tags intact during replacement process palindrome example madam is a word that reads same backward and forward it is a simple yet elegant form of symmetry in language replace http://stackoverflow.com/xyz1 with http://yahoo.com/abc1 result is new post on the site http://yahoo.com/abc1

this method works for multiple occurrences in text maintain structure of original string while updating links useful for updating references in content automatically
